hero.name: Pushpa Sharma
hero.tagline: 9 years of software engineering, 4+ years designing end-to-end Gen AI systems: RAG pipelines, multi-agent workflows, and conversational AI for banking, automotive, and healthcare.

paras: AI Engineer with 9 years of software engineering experience, including 3+ years building production Gen AI, Agentic AI, and ML applications for banking, automotive, and healthcare clients.

I design and ship end-to-end AI solutions — RAG pipelines, LLM integrations, multi-agent systems, and conversational AI — underpinned by 6 years of full-stack product engineering across banking, healthcare, media, and security domains.
Proficient in Python, LangChain/LangGraph, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and vector databases, with scalable deployment via FastAPI, Docker, and Kubernetes.

stats.label: years shipping Gen AI to prod

items: LLM Integration — GPT · Claude · Gemini · Llama

sections.project: Agent Toolkit AI — Gen AI modernization of the bank-agent platform
bullets: Modernized the legacy Bank Agent Toolkit into an AI-powered application; built RAG pipelines to securely retrieve customer information from internal databases and knowledge sources.
Developed AI-powered assistants for income analysis, planning recommendations, and direct-debit setup; built prompt templates and chaining logic with LangChain and LangGraph.
Enabled semantic search of financial records with FAISS/vector databases; integrated LLM inference and embeddings via Azure OpenAI and FastAPI.

sections.project: Ask Archie — Gen AI employee-support assistant
bullets: Built an LLM-based assistant (OpenAI GPT, LangChain, Pinecone/Weaviate) answering workplace queries from company policy docs, FAQs, and the knowledge base via RAG.
Designed confidence-based fallback and escalation: low-confidence or dissatisfied users are auto-transferred to live human support over WebSocket/SignalR.
Exposed real-time LLM inference and ML models as REST APIs with FastAPI; designed and developed the employee-facing chatbot UI.
Built an Agentic AI chatbot (GPT-4, Claude, LLaMA with LangChain/LangGraph) that helps customers explore Ford vehicles — design imagery, specs, pricing, and availability.
Enabled agent tool-calling against external APIs (availability, pricing, dealership information) via an MCP server; implemented a RAG pipeline over Ford's vehicle database using Pinecone.
Optimized models using ensemble techniques, reducing computation time by 40% while maintaining model performance; exposed AI/ML models as FastAPI services.
Built the conversational React.js interface and collaborated with UX designers to integrate AI seamlessly into the product experience.

Integrated an AI system into the Solara single-sign-on portal for medical employees; designed AI algorithms that improved predictive capability on client data (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, vector DBs).
Applied prompt engineering to early Gen AI features; developed reusable components in Next.js and React.js and built supporting services in Node.js and Python.
Implemented ML/DL models in production (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost) with data processing in NumPy/Pandas, served through FastAPI and Flask.
Reduced API errors through Redux-Saga state management and built the React.js data-management UI over PostgreSQL/NoSQL stores.
Developed the Vector Flow physical-security platform UI (React.js, Redux, Syncfusion), building reusable static and dynamic components for data-dense operational dashboards.
Delivered the Artist 360 media and entertainment platform end to end, including full CRUD functionality (React.js, Node.js, Express, SQL, REST APIs).

achievements: Reduced model computation time by 40% through ensemble optimization while maintaining accuracy.
Increased user engagement by 20% by delivering impactful, AI-powered product features.
